data.content: Shipment artifact: origin/main now points to 9a2c2eeda0b3dcbbafb48e7f6c83332acec97b5f, merge commit for codex/foolery-c6e8-opencode-idle-watchdog. Local final gates on merged main passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Remote GitHub Actions for the pushed main commit passed: CI run 25170387855 success, Coverage Badge run 25170387842 success. CI had coverage-regression annotations but the workflow conclusion was success.
